sub_tasks.desc: Coder Agent: Implement UploadController with file validation (size ≤ 100MB, MIME type application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet, non-empty). Create and persist ReconciliationSession entity with status PENDING. Invoke async IngestionService.startBatch and return immediate response with sessionId and status.
Tester Agent: Write and execute UploadControllerIT integration test to verify file validation, session creation, and async trigger response.
Coder Agent: Build IngestionService with CompletableFuture<Void> processFiles method. Update session status to PROCESSING before launching batch and to COMPLETED/FAILED after job completion.
Tester Agent: Write and execute IngestionServiceTest to mock batch launch and verify session status transitions.
DevOps Agent: Update application.yml with spring.batch.job.enabled=false, configure file-size limits, and set async pool sizes.
Coder Agent: Configure Spring Batch ReconciliationBatchConfig with two independent steps: ShopeeStep and LogisticsStep. Define EasyExcel SAX-based readers for each file type.
Coder Agent: Implement ShopeeOrderItemProcessor and LogisticsOrderItemProcessor for simple POJO field mapping, ensuring zero loops over bulk data.
Coder Agent: Implement JpaItemWriter for batch steps using TempShopeeOrderRepository and TempLogisticsOrderRepository.
Tester Agent: Write and execute BatchIntegrationTest with real Spring Batch job using tiny sample Excel files. Assert rows are correctly written to staging tables partitioned by session_id.
DevOps Agent: Update pom.xml or build.gradle to declare easyexcel dependency (version ≥ 3.3.0) and exclude Apache POI.
Coder Agent: Create Thymeleaf UI upload.html with drag-and-drop zone and file inputs.
Coder Agent: Implement upload.js with Axios POST to /upload and client-side polling of /session/{sessionId} every 2 seconds for real-time status updates.
Tester Agent: Execute PerformanceTest simulating a 10MB Excel file upload. Measure and verify upload response is <200ms and memory usage is stable (no OOM).
Tester Agent: Execute GuardrailTest for static analysis to check for prohibited loops and verify only EasyExcel dependency is used.
DevOps Agent: Extend CI pipeline (.github/workflows/ci.yml) to run static analysis (SonarQube) with loop-detection rules and execute the full test suite.
Reviewer Agent: Conduct architectural review of the async pipeline. Verify session isolation via foreign keys, correct use of EasyExcel SAX streaming, and compliance with zero-loops guardrail.
Reviewer Agent: Validate security implementation: ensure CSRF protection on Thymeleaf forms, placeholder JWT auth is in place, and input sanitization is performed.
DevOps Agent: Update Dockerfile for multi-stage build, copy JAR, and set JVM memory limits.
DevOps Agent: Add stubbed Prometheus metrics endpoint (/actuator/metrics) via MetricsService and create a Grafana dashboard template.
DevOps Agent: Configure centralized logging with ELK placeholders in logback.xml.
DevOps Agent: Provision staging environment (K8s/VM) with database credentials and configure async thread-pool size.
DevOps Agent: Verify deployed service meets SLA by testing upload endpoint for <200ms response time and checking logs for session creation and batch start events.
Tester Agent: Document all test results (unit, integration, performance, guardrail) and sign off on readiness for Phase 3.
Reviewer Agent: Approve all code changes after confirming CI pipeline passes and test suite is successful. Sign off Phase 2 deliverables.
Manager Agent: Review Phase 2 scope, resource allocation, and timeline. Approve go/no-go decision to proceed to Phase 3 after all sub-agent sign-offs are received.
